text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #5)
I don't thing so, I just tried without any make.conf and same error occured.
Could this be in relation to this commit?

Replace USE_AUTOTOOLS=autoconf with USES=autoreconf

0.15 builds just fine, and aways did. Something in this new update causes this build to fail.
